doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No such State Bar of California protocol exists, and the Legal Services Trust Fund Commission has no authority to waive UPL under Business & Professions Code §6125.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such State Bar of California protocol exists; the Trust Fund Commission lacks authority to waive UPL under §6125, and the document's provisions contradict California's actual rules on attorney supervision of paralegals.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such State Bar of California protocol exists, and the Legal Services Trust Fund Commission has no authority to waive UPL under Business & Professions Code §6125.
